creator: mikea@mikea.ath.cx
text:
mount_smbfs fails. Command and error message are shown below:
		mikea# mount_smbfs -I hp //mikea@hp/c /smb_hp_c
		mount_smbfs: vfsload(smbfs): Exec format error
	an additional line is written to /var/log/messages:
		Jun  8 19:44:36 mikea /kernel: link_elf: symbol iconv_open undefined>
	Problem is completely and reassuringly repeatable. 
	SMBFS mounts also fail at boot time. Output from dmesg -a is:
		smbfs: 
		link_elf: symbol iconv_open undefined
		smbfs: 
		vfsload(smbfs)
		: 
		Exec format error
		/smb_hp_c 
		link_elf: symbol iconv_open undefined
		smbfs: 
		vfsload(smbfs)
		: 
		Exec format error
		/smb_win_c 
		link_elf: symbol iconv_open undefined
		smbfs: 
		vfsload(smbfs)
		: 
		Exec format error
		/smb_win_d 
		link_elf: symbol iconv_open undefined
		smbfs: 
		vfsload(smbfs)
		: 
		Exec format error
		/smb_win2_c 
									



>

Fix: 

none known
How-To-Repeat: 	issue any mount_smbfs command that would be valid on this system 
	or reboot with valid smbfs lines in /etc/fstab
